candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line with populated values across years; most specific operating revenue label.
Also a top-line revenue total and matches the reported revenue values; useful as fallback if label changes over time.
Section header, not the actual numeric revenue line.

variables.notes: Using two revenue labels as a priority list, not a sum.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales total row among candidates; appropriate single COGS mapping.
Also a plausible direct cost row, but less clearly the primary total than 'Cost of Revenues - Total'.
Possible component/placeholder, but less preferable than the explicit total cost-of-revenues line.

variables.notes: Although the preview is blank, the label exists and gross profit equals revenue, which is consistent with zero/immaterial COGS in shown years.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and preferred over components/subtotals per rule hierarchy.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A component, but should not be used when a populated explicit SG&A row exists.
Broad header/aggregate bucket and includes more than SG&A; not preferred when explicit SG&A exists.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Selected only the explicit populated SG&A row. Excluded depreciation/amortization components and broader operating expense totals.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This row explicitly excludes R&D, so it is not an R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No dedicated research/development expense line is present. The selected SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D, so XRD is set to empty rather than inferred.

candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest-cost label; preferred over broader finance totals and duplicates/components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Also valid, but appears to duplicate 'Interest Expense' numerically in most years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but appears to be included in the main interest expense line, so adding it would likely double count.

variables.notes: Used the plain recurring interest expense line and excluded net finance totals and lease-interest component to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and explicitly excludes non-controlling interests conceptually.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-attributable equity line and useful fallback if labels vary by year.
Also matches values, but less explicit about parent attribution than the preferred lines.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list of parent-attributable equity labels to keep BE exclusive of any minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Not suitable because it is a total equity line, not a standalone minority interest line.
Income statement flow item, not a balance sheet minority interest stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement flow item, not the balance sheet NCI line.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest/non-controlling interests balance sheet row is present.
